openIssues.title: failed issue waiting on linked PR checks to finish
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 self-bootstrap replay 能稳定覆盖 linked PR checks 仍在 pending 的恢复场景。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- scenario stays local and deterministic

### OutOfScope
- live GitHub checks API or daemon polling

### RequiredSemantics
- failed issue remains blocked while the linked PR is still waiting on checks

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap checks pending fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture for pending linked PR checks

## 验收
- [ ] linked PR checks pending path stays reproducible

## agent-loop blocked resume escalation
